summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sachin Travels/Holiday Emporium travel marketing site. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI components and integrations functioning well with minor issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Close button not clickable due to navbar overlay interception
ui_bugs.details: Navbar overlay prevents clicking the promo banner close button. Needs z-index adjustment or force click implementation.

ui_bugs.issue: Close button functionality not working properly
ui_bugs.details: Sticky CTA remains visible after clicking close button. State management issue.

passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/tours returns 6 tour packages with all required fields
Backend API: POST /api/leads creates leads successfully with validation
Backend API: GET /api/leads returns submitted leads correctly
Backend API: Error handling for invalid tour IDs (404) and invalid lead data (422)
Frontend: Hero section loads with working mode toggle (Spiritual/Adventure)
Frontend: Hero background images switch correctly between modes
Frontend: Glassmorphism navbar with scroll effect working
Frontend: Tour categories bento grid displays 6 categories correctly
Frontend: Featured packages filter tabs work (All, Spiritual, Wildlife, International, Coastal)
Frontend: View Itinerary accordion opens with day-by-day details
Frontend: Lead form submission with validation and success message
Frontend: WhatsApp floating button with correct wa.me link
Frontend: Explore Asia infinite scroll carousel with 16 destination items
Frontend: Footer with complete contact info, tour links, destinations, company links
Frontend: Navigation links and CTA buttons working
Frontend: No JavaScript errors or console errors detected
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix promo banner close button overlay issue and sticky CTA close functionality. Both are minor UI issues that don't affect core functionality.
